generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T COCHLEARIA. Cochlearia armoracia, Linn. Nat. order , Cruciferæ; Common names , Horseradish; (G.), Meerrettig; (Fr.), Raifort. Preparation , Tincture of the root. Authorities. 1 , Archive f. Hom., 17, 3, 176; 2 , Dr. Cate, proving, N. Am. J. of Hom., 1, 336. MIND. ► Is extremely irresolute, [1] . ► (Thinking is difficult in the evening, without confusion of the head) (after three hours), [1] . HEAD. ► Dulness of the head, is unable to collect his thoughts with rapidity, [1] . ► Headache in a small spot, now here, now there, a pressure deep in the brain, not aggravated by motion, but worse on widely opening the eyes, [1] . ► Pressive boring headache, as if the frontal bone would fall out, [1] . EYES. ► Eyes swollen, [1] . ► Obscuration of vision for a few minutes (after half an hour), [1] . MOUTH. ► Dull sensation in the teeth, as if they were soft, and became bent on chewing, [1] . THROAT. ► Scraping in the throat, with nausea, [1] . STOMACH. [10.] ► Retching and vomiting of bilious fluid, [1] . ► Crampy, tensive pain above the epigastrium, apparently in the diaphragm, relieved by bending forward, [2] . ABDOMEN. ► Griping pain around umbilicus, [2] . ANUS. ► Involuntary passage of mucus from anus, [2] . STOOL. ► Stools increased in frequency, [2] . URINARY ORGANS. ► *Burning and cutting at the glans during micturition; felt also before and after , [2] . ► *Increased inclination to urinate; urination eight or ten times daily instead of four , [2] . ► Increased secretion of urine, [2] . ► Urine pale and limpid, [2] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Pain in all the joints, while lying still towards morning, worse when lying on the side; it disappeared on moving about and on rising, [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Night ), Towards morning, pain in joints. ► ( Lying on side ), Pain in joints. ► ( Opening eyes widely ), Headache. ► Amelioration. ► ( Bending forwards ), Pain above epigastrium. ► ( Moving about ), Pain in joints. ► ( Rising from bed ), Pain in joints.
